generated.as:
CASE
				WHEN metadata IS NULL OR metadata = '' THEN NULL
				WHEN NOT (metadata IS JSON OBJECT) THEN NULL
				WHEN (metadata::jsonb->>'organizationId') ~* '^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$'
					THEN (metadata::jsonb->>'organizationId')::uuid
				ELSE NULL
			END

cal_event_attendees_one_identity.name: cal_event_attendees_one_identity
cal_event_attendees_one_identity.value: ("cal_event_attendees"."user_id" IS NOT NULL) <> ("cal_event_attendees"."email" IS NOT NULL)

cal_reminders_trigger_xor.name: cal_reminders_trigger_xor
cal_reminders_trigger_xor.value:
(
				("cal_reminders"."trigger_kind" = 'relative' AND "cal_reminders"."offset_minutes" IS NOT NULL AND "cal_reminders"."absolute_fire_at" IS NULL)
				OR
				("cal_reminders"."trigger_kind" = 'absolute' AND "cal_reminders"."absolute_fire_at" IS NOT NULL AND "cal_reminders"."offset_minutes" IS NULL)
			)

drive_shares_one_target.name: drive_shares_one_target
drive_shares_one_target.value: ("drive_shares"."file_id" IS NOT NULL) <> ("drive_shares"."folder_id" IS NOT NULL)

edges_source_relation_slug_uniq.name: edges_source_relation_slug_uniq
edges_source_relation_slug_uniq.where: "edges"."target_entity_id" IS NULL AND "edges"."target_slug" IS NOT NULL
